name: copilot-collection
description: Curated GitHub Copilot agents, skills, instructions, hooks, and workflows for Microsoft Foundry, Fabric, Power BI/TMDL, Azure DevOps, and AI/LLM systems. Knowledge-base-backed with 90-day re-validation cycle.

agents.name: ms-foundry-specialist
agents.description: Microsoft Foundry specialist — Foundry Agent Service, Foundry IQ, azure-ai-projects SDKs, Microsoft Agent Framework

agents.name: python-specialist
agents.description: Python for AI/LLM systems — async clients, structured output, retries, tool-use loops, evals

agents.name: observability-specialist
agents.description: Observability — KQL, Application Insights, OpenTelemetry, sampling, dashboards

agents.name: powerbi-tmdl-specialist
agents.description: Power BI / TMDL / DAX — PBIP projects, evaluation context, time intelligence, RLS, XMLA deployment

agents.name: eval-framework-specialist
agents.description: LLM evaluation framework — deterministic + AI-assisted + agentic metrics, golden datasets, regression tracking

agents.name: microsoft-fabric-specialist
agents.description: Microsoft Fabric — Lakehouse, Warehouse, OneLake, Delta tables, semantic-model REST API, Fabric SQL endpoint

agents.name: azure-devops-specialist
agents.description: Azure DevOps — Pipeline YAML, REST API, branch policies, workload identity federation, PR automation

skills.name: simplify
skills.description: Refactors recently-changed code: removes duplication, dead code, premature abstraction

skills.name: ultrathink
skills.description: Forces structured deliberation for hard architectural decisions with tradeoff matrices

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Systematic 8-category PR review (security → correctness → error handling → types → performance → testing → observability → maintainability)

skills.name: kb-revalidate
skills.description: Re-validates KB files older than 90 days against authoritative sources

skills.name: agentic-eval
skills.description: Designs eval suites for an agent — deterministic checks, AI-assisted scorers, agentic metrics, golden datasets

instructions.name: markdown
instructions.description: Markdown structure, headings, links, code blocks, accessibility

instructions.name: agent-md
instructions.description: Custom agent file (.agent.md) standards per official Copilot CLI spec

instructions.name: skill-md
instructions.description: Custom skill file (SKILL.md) standards per official agent-skills spec

instructions.name: azure-pipeline-yaml
instructions.description: Azure DevOps pipeline YAML — WIF auth, no PATs, displayName, idempotent deployments

instructions.name: github-actions-yaml
instructions.description: GitHub Actions workflows — OIDC auth, action SHA pinning, minimal permissions, fail-fast

instructions.name: tmdl
instructions.description: TMDL syntax — 4-space indent, LF line endings, marked date table, format strings

instructions.name: dax
instructions.description: DAX standards — DIVIDE over /, time intelligence with marked date table, measures over calc columns

instructions.name: arm-template
instructions.description: ARM template best practices — managed identity, tags, diagnostic settings, no hardcoded IDs

instructions.name: bicep
instructions.description: Bicep IaC — secure params, modular templates, Azure Verified Modules, what-if validation

hooks.name: kb-staleness-warning
hooks.description: Warns at sessionStart if any KB file has last_validated > 90 days ago

workflows.name: eval-regression
workflows.description: On PRs touching prompts/agents/tools, runs smoke evals and compares to baseline

cookbook.name: recipe-creating-a-foundry-agent
cookbook.description: End-to-end walkthrough: scaffold a deployable Microsoft Foundry agent with Foundry IQ, OpenTelemetry, evals
